prompt:
A clean modern wellness-brand infographic poster on a PURE WHITE background, 1:1 square composition, 4K resolution. Inspired by the side-panel infographic style of the Dialed Sea Moss Gummies jar (chevron callouts + icons + teal/gold accents — see provided reference image).

Topic: 'WHAT'S INSIDE EACH GUMMY' — ingredient-spotlight infographic featuring the three key actives.

LAYOUT:
  • TOP — header: small brand lockup centered (DIALED SEA MOSS Gummies teal+gold mini-logo). Below it, bold ALL-CAPS headline 'WHAT'S INSIDE EACH GUMMY' in deep ink-black. Sub-headline: 'Three time-tested botanicals working together.' Thin gold horizontal rule.
  • MIDDLE — three INGREDIENT CARDS in a vertical column (or 3-column row if it fits), each with: a hand-drawn ink-line botanical illustration on the left, and on the right a chevron-shaped callout (matching the jar's chevron style) in teal containing bold ALL-CAPS ingredient name + dosage. Below each card: 2-3 short bullet points in light-gray body text explaining what the ingredient does.
     1. SEA MOSS (250mg) — botanical illustration of sea moss fronds. Benefits: 'Rich source of 92 minerals · Supports thyroid function · Promotes gut health'.
     2. BURDOCK ROOT (150mg) — botanical illustration of burdock root. Benefits: 'Natural detox support · Skin clarity · Anti-inflammatory'.
     3. DANDELION (100mg) — botanical illustration of dandelion. Benefits: 'Liver support · Mild diuretic · Rich in vitamins A, C, K'.
  • BOTTOM — small footer strip: tiny disclaimer 'These statements have not been evaluated by the FDA…' in light gray, plus a small product rendering of the jar on the right with the brand wordmark.

DESIGN SYSTEM:
  • Background: pure clean white with very subtle warm-gray paper texture.
  • Accent colors: muted TEAL/CYAN, warm GOLD/YELLOW, deep INK-BLACK type, warm-gray for sub-text.
  • Typography: bold ALL-CAPS condensed display sans-serif for headlines, clean modern sans-serif for body. NO script fonts.
  • Botanical illustrations: clean black ink line-art style, NO color.
  • Spacing: generous breathing room.
  • Style: editorial wellness-brand infographic — Athletic Greens / Hims / Goop aesthetic.

ABSOLUTE RULES:
  • All text MUST be cleanly spelled, no garbled letters, no AI-text artifacts.
  • 1:1 square, 4K, pure white background, NO border, NO frame.
  • Reference the provided images for brand color/type/icon-style language and the small product rendering in the footer.
